nasb.text: He said to them, “Why do you do such things, the evil things that I hear from all these people?

esv.text: And he said to them, “Why do you do such things? For I hear of your evil dealings from all these people.

cnv.text: 以利就對他們說：“你們為甚麼作這些事？我親自從眾民那裡聽見了你們的惡行。

ccb.text: 就对他们说：“你们为什么做这样的事？我从百姓口中听说了有关你们的恶行。
